errors.blocked: Account temporarily blocked from new bookings until {{date}}
errors.hasUpcoming: You already have an upcoming booking. Please complete it before creating a new one.
errors.weeklyLimit: Weekly booking limit reached. Maximum 4 bookings per week allowed.
errors.weeklyLimitByName: User has reached the weekly booking limit (4 bookings)
errors.timeFormat: Invalid time format. Please use HH:mm format
errors.pastDate: Cannot book for past date and time
errors.outOfHours: Bookings are only available between 9 AM and 6 PM
errors.minAdvance: Bookings must be made at least 30 minutes in advance
errors.invalidAdditionalEmail: Invalid email format in additional users
errors.notFoundAdditionalEmail: One or more additional users were not found
errors.duration: Invalid booking duration. Must be between {{min}} and {{max}} hours
errors.notAuthorized: Not authorized to delete this booking
errors.bookingNotFoundForUser: Booking not found for this user
errors.missingFieldsNames: Missing required fields (username, room name, date, start/end time)
errors.slotConflict: Time slot conflicts with an existing booking
errors.fetchAllUserFailed: Failed to fetch all bookings for user
errors.fetchNextUpcomingFailed: Failed to fetch next upcoming booking
errors.unauthorizedCheckIn: Not authorized to check in to this booking
errors.checkInFailed: Failed to check in to booking
errors.transferInvalidStatus: Cannot transfer pending or active bookings
errors.transferOwnBooking: Cannot request transfer for your own booking
errors.noTransferOwnBooking: You already have an upcoming booking. You cannot request a transfer.

success.pendingApproval: Booking created and pending admin approval
success.deleted: Booking cancelled successfully and will be permanently deleted in 7 days

notify.createdOpen: Your booking for room {{room}} has been created and confirmed successfully.
notify.createdLarge: Your booking for room {{room}} has been created and is pending admin approval.
notify.createdGeneric: Your booking for room {{room}} has been created successfully.
notify.deleted: Your booking for room {{room}} has been cancelled successfully.
notify.statusUpdatedAdmin: You updated booking status for {{user}} to {{status}}.
notify.statusUpdatedUser: Your booking for {{room}} was updated to {{status}} by {{admin}}.
notify.userCanceledByAdmin: Your booking for {{room}} was canceled by {{admin}}
notify.createdByAdminPending: Admin {{admin}} created a pending booking for you in {{room}}
notify.createdByAdminConfirmed: Admin {{admin}} created a confirmed booking for you in {{room}}
notify.blocked: Your account has been temporarily blocked from bookings due to excessive cancellations/misses.
notify.cancellationWarning: Warning: {{remaining}} more cancellations/misses will result in a block.
notify.missed: Your booking for {{room}} has been marked as missed
notify.completed: Your booking for {{room}} has been completed
notify.canceled: Your booking for {{room}} has been canceled
notify.statusUpdate: Your booking status for {{room}} has been updated
notify.statusAutoUpdate: Your booking for {{room}} has been automatically marked as {{status}}.
notify.transferRequestReceived: New transfer request for your {{room}} booking
notify.transferAccepted: Transfer accepted! You now own the {{room}} booking

notify.profileUpdated: Your profile has been updated successfully.
notify.emailChanged: Your email has been updated successfully.
notify.emailChangeCancelled: Your email change request has been cancelled.
notify.roleUpdated: Your account role has been updated to {{role}}.
notify.accountBlocked: Your account has been blocked until {{date}}.
